message:
🐛 Include 'connecting' state in offline detection for skeleton (#484)

The initial agent status is 'connecting' before we know if the agent
is truly offline. Previously, 'connecting' was excluded from offline
detection, causing demo data to flash briefly before skeleton showed.

Now any status other than 'connected' triggers skeleton display when
demo mode is OFF.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
